name: Accenture
description: Accenture MasterBrand template — Arial/Arial Black fonts, 7 layouts, white cover, white section divider

cover.note: Layout 0: 'Title: White3+Image'. White background — use BLACK text. idx=0 center title @1.04in, idx=1 subtitle @2.62in, idx=2 date @3.49in, idx=12 body text @3.68in.

content.note: Layout 2: '3_Blank - Light'. Title idx=0 @0.30in (0.34in tall). Breadcrumb idx=11 @0.06in. Body idx=10 @0.63in. Footer idx=20, SlideNumber idx=21.

content_1col.note: Layout 1: '1_Short Headline and 1 Column'. Title idx=0 @0.30in, Content idx=18 @0.78in (12.64in tall). Footer idx=20, SlideNumber idx=21.

content_headline_only.note: Layout 4: 'Long Headline Only'. Title idx=0 @0.30in (0.63in tall). Footer idx=3, SlideNumber idx=10. Clean canvas for pattern shapes.

content_subtitle.note: Layout 3: 'Short Headline-subtitle'. Title idx=0 @0.39in, Subtitle idx=11 @0.71in. Footer idx=3, SlideNumber idx=12.

content_subhead_subtitle.note: Layout 5: '1_Subhead (top) and Subtitle'. Subhead idx=36 @0.10in, Title idx=0 @0.39in, Subtitle idx=37 @0.76in. Footer idx=10, SlideNumber idx=11.

section.note: Layout 6: 'Title Master: White'. White background — use BLACK text. idx=0 center title @0.36in (2.43in tall), idx=13 body @2.79in (2.49in tall).
